caption.caption: Are you sure you want to perform this action?

eSignature.ConfirmationMessage: By completing this action, I certify that I have reviewed the changes that will be made to the system. I have approval and permission to perform this change.

caption.caption: CHAMB. COOLD. TEMP. S.P.: /*N:4 aiValuesFromHMI_156_C ZEROFILL DP:1*/ºC
CHAMB. COOLD. TEMP. S.P.: /*N:5 aiHMIValues2_158_F NOFILL DP:1*/ ºF

vbaItem.vbaCode:
Public blnAreaNodeHMI_1 As Boolean Public blnAreaNodeHMI_2 As Boolean Public blnSecurityMaintenance As Boolean Public blnSecurityEngineer As Boolean Public blnSecuritySupervisor As Boolean Public blnSecurityOperator As Boolean Public blnSecurityGuest As Boolean Public strCurrentScreenName As String
Public strPrintMiscVal As String Public strPrintCycleReport As String Public strPrintCycleParam As String Public strPrintAnalogVal As String Public strPrintLastCycle As String
Public blnPrintMiscVal As Boolean Public blnPrintCycleReport As Boolean Public blnPrintCycleParam As Boolean Public blnPrintAnalogVal As Boolean Public blnPrintLastCycle As Boolean
Public bReportMaster As Boolean Public WithEvents HMIAppCli As DisplayClient.Application 'app events used to update real time status Attribute HMIAppCli.VB_VarHelpID = -1
Private WithEvents appStatus As Application 'app events used to update real time status Attribute appStatus.VB_VarHelpID = -1
Public HMITagGroup As TagGroup 'define HMI Tag Group
Dim xlApp As Object
Private Sub btnLogin_Released()
End Sub
Private Sub btnLogout_Press()
Login "ABQOT\SterisDefault", "Defaultpbuc&087"
End Sub
Private Sub Display_AnimationStart()
Set HMIAppCli = Me.Application ' Set Application Name
'Call GetLocalNode ' Get Local Node Login "ABQOT\SterisDefault", "Defaultpbuc&087" ' Login Default User
If HMITagGroup Is Nothing Then 'Checks for existence of tag group Set HMITagGroup = Application.CreateTagGroup(Me.AreaName, 500)
HMITagGroup.Add "{[SterisPW]asPrintBuffer[0]}" HMITagGroup.Add "{[SterisPW]bHMIPrintDone}" HMITagGroup.Add "sCurrentUserName" HMITagGroup.Add "bConfigRecircChemicalVisible" HMITagGroup.Add "bConfigRecircPortVisible" HMITagGroup.Add "bConfigFRinseTypeVisible" HMITagGroup.Add "bConfigFRinsePortVisible" HMITagGroup.Add "{[SterisPW]sCurrentHmiUser}" 'GB 2018-04-17 Line added to print correct user HMITagGroup.Add "bIsReportMaster" 'MC 2024-01-31 APG12090 SSQ20230811918 HMITagGroup.Add "{[SterisPW]sPrinterName}" 'MC 2024-01-31 APG12090 SSQ20230811918 HMITagGroup.Add "{[SterisPW]sRemoteNetworkPath}" 'MC 2024-01-31 APG12090 SSQ20230811918 End If
bReportMaster = HMITagGroup.Item("bIsReportMaster").Value 'APG12091 20240606 MC Local tag for report master load or unload
Call GetCurrentUserName ' Get Current Username on startup
End Sub Private Sub GMP_SE_Login(UserName As String)
Set sHmiUserName = GMP_SE.Application.CurrentUserName
End Sub
Private Sub GetCurrentUserName()
On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
Dim strPlainName As String Dim strFullName As String Dim NameStartPos As Integer Dim NameLength As Integer
strFullName = HMIAppCli.Application.CurrentUserName NameStartPos = InStr(strFullName, "\") 'Remove the Windows Domain part of the user name NameLength = Len(strFullName) - NameStartPos strPlainName = Right(strFullName, NameLength) txtUserName.Caption = Left(strPlainName, 20)
HMITagGroup.Item("sCurrentUserName").Value = Left(strPlainName, 20) HMITagGroup.Item("{[SterisPW]sCurrentHmiUser}").Value = Left(strPlainName, 20) 'GB 2018-04-17 Line added to print correct user
Exit Sub
ErrorHandler:
txtUserName.Caption = "Error" LogDiagnosticsMessage "Error Retrieving User Name", ftDiagSeverityError, ftDiagAudienceEngineer LogDiagnosticsMessage "VBA Error - Screen Name: " & Me.FullName & ", Procedure Name: GetCurrentUserName(): " & Hex(Err.Number) & " - " & Err.Description, ftDiagSeverityError End Sub
Private Sub bHMIDataToPrint_Change()
On Error GoTo ErrorHandler If bReportMaster Then 'MC 2024-06-06 APG12091 If bHMIDataToPrint.Value > 0 And blnPrintMiscVal Then 'Printing Misc Values PRT_Print (strPrintMiscVal) ElseIf bHMIDataToPrint.Value > 0 And blnPrintAnalogVal Then 'Printing Analog Values PRT_Print (strPrintAnalogVal) ElseIf bHMIDataToPrint.Value > 0 And blnPrintCycleParam Then 'Printing Cycle Parameters PRT_Print (strPrintCycleParam) ElseIf bHMIDataToPrint.Value > 0 And blnPrintCycleReport Then 'Printing Cycle Report PRT_Print (strPrintCycleReport) ElseIf bHMIDataToPrint.Value > 0 And blnPrintLastCycle Then 'Printing last cycle PRT_Print (strPrintLastCycle) ElseIf bHMIDataToPrint.Value > 0 Then 'Printing unknown strings PRT_Print ("C:\Data\Print\PrintBuffer.txt") Else HMITagGroup.Item("{[SterisPW]bHMIPrintDone}").Value = 0 'Reset the print done flag when no data to print End If
End If 'MC 2024-01-31 APG12090 SSQ20230811918
Exit Sub
ErrorHandler:
LogDiagnosticsMessage "Error managing print pointer", ftDiagSeverityError, ftDiagAudienceEngineer LogDiagnosticsMessage "VBA Error - Screen Name: " & Me.FullName & ", Procedure Name: bHMIDataToPrint_Change(): " & Hex(Err.Number) & " - " & Err.Description, ftDiagSeverityError
End Sub
Public Sub GetCurrentUserCode() ' Extract Curent User Security Code
blnSecurityEngineer = HMIAppCli.Application.CurrentUserHasCode("A") blnSecuritySupervisor = HMIAppCli.Application.CurrentUserHasCode("B") blnSecurityOperator = HMIAppCli.Application.CurrentUserHasCode("C") blnSecurityGuest = HMIAppCli.Application.CurrentUserHasCode("D") blnSecurityMaintenance = HMIAppCli.Application.CurrentUserHasCode("E")
End Sub Private Sub Display_BeforeAnimationStop() Set appStatus = Nothing ' destroy tag group Set HMITagGroup = Nothing End Sub Private Sub PRT_Print(FileName As String)
On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
'APG10000 DGB 2020-06-12 - Close All Opened Connection Close
Open FileName For Append As #1
Print #1, "" & HMITagGroup.Item("{[SterisPW]asPrintBuffer[0]}").Value 'Open required file and adding first string in PLC print buffer
Close #1
HMITagGroup.Item("{[SterisPW]bHMIPrintDone}").Value = 1 'Set the print done flag for PLC
Exit Sub
ErrorHandler:
LogDiagnosticsMessage "Error printing to file", ftDiagSeverityError, ftDiagAudienceEngineer LogDiagnosticsMessage "VBA Error - Screen Name: " & Me.FullName & ", Procedure Name: PRT_Print(): " & Hex(Err.Number) & " - " & Err.Description, ftDiagSeverityError
End Sub
Private Sub PrintingMiscVal_Change()
On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
If bReportMaster Then 'MC 2024-06-06 APG12091
If PrintingMiscVal.Value = 1 Then strPrintMiscVal = "C:\Data\Print\MiscValues_" & Format(Now(), "yyyymmdd_hhmmss") & ".txt" 'On rising edge of Misc Values Print Request, set the new file name blnPrintMiscVal = True Else If bHMIDataToPrint.Value = 0 And blnPrintMiscVal Then 'On faling edge of Misc Values Print Request, put CRC at the end of the file blnPrintMiscVal = False PutCRC (strPrintMiscVal) PrintFile (strPrintMiscVal) End If End If End If 'MC 2024-01-31 APG12090 SSQ20230811918 Exit Sub
ErrorHandler:
LogDiagnosticsMessage "Error Misc Values Printing request", ftDiagSeverityError, ftDiagAudienceEngineer LogDiagnosticsMessage "VBA Error - Screen Name: " & Me.FullName & ", Procedure Name: PrintingMiscVal_Change(): " & Hex(Err.Number) & " - " & Err.Description, ftDiagSeverityError
End Sub
Private Sub PrintingCycleParam_Change()
On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
If bReportMaster Then 'MC 2024-06-06 APG12091
If PrintingCycleParam.Value = 1 Then strPrintCycleParam = "C:\Data\Print\CycleParameters_" & Format(Now(), "yyyymmdd_hhmmss") & ".txt" 'On rising edge of Cycle Parameters Print Request, set the new file name blnPrintCycleParam = True Else If bHMIDataToPrint.Value = 0 And blnPrintCycleParam Then 'On faling edge of Cycle Parameters Print Request, put CRC at the end of the file blnPrintCycleParam = False PutCRC (strPrintCycleParam) PrintFile (strPrintCycleParam) End If End If End If 'MC 2024-01-31 APG12090 SSQ20230811918 Exit Sub
ErrorHandler:
LogDiagnosticsMessage "Error Cycle Parameters Printing request", ftDiagSeverityError, ftDiagAudienceEngineer LogDiagnosticsMessage "VBA Error - Screen Name: " & Me.FullName & ", Procedure Name: PrintingCycleParam_Change(): " & Hex(Err.Number) & " - " & Err.Description, ftDiagSeverityError
End Sub
Private Sub PrintingCycleReport_Change()
On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
If bReportMaster Then 'MC 2024-06-06 APG12091
If PrintingCycleReport.Value = 1 Then strPrintCycleReport = "C:\Data\Print\CycleReport_" & Format(Now(), "yyyymmdd_hhmmss") & ".txt" 'On rising edge of Cycle Report Print Request, set the new file name blnPrintCycleReport = True Else If bHMIDataToPrint.Value = 0 And blnPrintCycleReport Then 'On faling edge of Cycle Report Print Request, put CRC at the end of the file blnPrintCycleReport = False PutCRC (strPrintCycleReport) PrintFile (strPrintCycleReport) End If End If End If 'MC 2024-01-31 APG12090 SSQ20230811918 Exit Sub
ErrorHandler:
LogDiagnosticsMessage "Error Cycle Report Printing request", ftDiagSeverityError, ftDiagAudienceEngineer LogDiagnosticsMessage "VBA Error - Screen Name: " & Me.FullName & ", Procedure Name: PrintingCycleReport_Change(): " & Hex(Err.Number) & " - " & Err.Description, ftDiagSeverityError
End Sub Private Sub PrintingAnalogVal_Change()
On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
If bReportMaster Then 'MC 2024-06-06 APG12091
If PrintingAnalogVal.Value = 1 Then strPrintAnalogVal = "C:\Data\Print\AnalogValues_" & Format(Now(), "yyyymmdd_hhmmss") & ".txt" 'On rising edge of Analog Values Print Request, set the new file name blnPrintAnalogVal = True Else If bHMIDataToPrint.Value = 0 And blnPrintAnalogVal Then 'On faling edge of Analog Values Print Request, put CRC at the end of the file blnPrintAnalogVal = False PutCRC (strPrintAnalogVal) PrintFile (strPrintAnalogVal) End If End If End If 'MC 2024-01-31 APG12090 SSQ20230811918 Exit Sub
ErrorHandler:
LogDiagnosticsMessage "Error Analog Values Printing request", ftDiagSeverityError, ftDiagAudienceEngineer LogDiagnosticsMessage "VBA Error - Screen Name: " & Me.FullName & ", Procedure Name: PrintingAnalogVal_Change(): " & Hex(Err.Number) & " - " & Err.Description, ftDiagSeverityError
End Sub Private Sub PrintingLastCycle_Change()
On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
If bReportMaster Then 'MC 2024-06-06 APG12091
If PrintingLastCycle.Value = 1 Then strPrintLastCycle = "C:\Data\Print\LastCycle_" & Format(Now(), "yyyymmdd_hhmmss") & ".txt" 'On rising edge of Last Cycle Print Request, set the new file name blnPrintLastCycle = True Else If bHMIDataToPrint.Value = 0 And blnPrintLastCycle Then 'On faling edge of Last Cycle Print Request, put CRC at the end of the file blnPrintLastCycle = False PutCRC (strPrintLastCycle) PrintFile (strPrintLastCycle) End If End If End If 'MC 2024-01-31 APG12090 SSQ20230811918 Exit Sub
ErrorHandler:
LogDiagnosticsMessage "Error Last Cycle Printing request", ftDiagSeverityError, ftDiagAudienceEngineer LogDiagnosticsMessage "VBA Error - Screen Name: " & Me.FullName & ", Procedure Name: PrintingLastCycle_Change(): " & Hex(Err.Number) & " - " & Err.Description, ftDiagSeverityError
End Sub Private Sub PutCRC(FileName As String)
On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
Dim strDataLine, strFileName As String, lStrLen, lCRC, lSeed As Long, i As Integer
lSeed = 20160413 strFileName = FileName
'APG10000 DGB 2020-06-12 - Close All Opened Connection Close
Open strFileName For Input As #1
While Not EOF(1) Line Input #1, strDataLine ' read data 1 line at a time
lStrLen = Len(strDataLine)
For i = 1 To lStrLen
lCRC = lCRC + Asc(strDataLine) ' Add all characters in file to get checksum strDataLine = Right(strDataLine, lStrLen - i)
Next
Wend
Close #1
lCRC = (lCRC + lSeed) ^ 2 ' Compute sum of all characters and ramdom SEED to obfuscate CRC
Open strFileName For Append As #1
Print #1, "Checksum: " & lCRC ' Write CRC checksum at the end of the file
Close #1
Exit Sub
ErrorHandler:
LogDiagnosticsMessage "Error creating CRC", ftDiagSeverityError, ftDiagAudienceEngineer LogDiagnosticsMessage "VBA Error - Screen Name: " & Me.FullName & ", Procedure Name: PutCRC(): " & Hex(Err.Number) & " - " & Err.Description, ftDiagSeverityError
End Sub
Private Sub RSView32SEIdleDetectControl1_EnterIdleState()
End Sub Private Sub PrintFile(FileName As String) If bReportMaster Then 'APG12091 20240606 MC Local tag for report master load or unload Dim xlApp As Object Dim tmpString As String Dim printerName As String 'MC 2024-01-31 APG12090 SSQ20230811918
Set xlApp = CreateObject("WScript.shell") printerName = HMITagGroup.Item("{[SterisPW]sPrinterName}").Value 'Print to PDF tmpString = "NOTEPAD /PT """ & FileName & """ ""PDF24"""
'Open text file in notepad and send the print command to print to default printer xlApp.Run (tmpString)
'Print to USB coupon printer tmpString = "NOTEPAD /PT " & Chr(34) & txtFileName.Caption & Chr(34) & " " & Chr(34) & printerName & Chr(34) 'MC 2024-01-31 APG12090 SSQ20230811918
'Open text file in notepad and send the print command to print to default printer xlApp.Run (tmpString)
Set xlApp = Nothing End If 'MC 2024-01-31 APG12090 SSQ20230811918 End Sub
Public Sub HMIAppCli_Login(ByVal UserName As String)
Call GetCurrentUserName 'Get Current User Name on Login Call GetCurrentUserCode
End Sub
Private Sub txtUserName_Click()
End Sub
Private Sub txtUserName1_Click()
End Sub
